nasb.text: Now in a large house there are not only gold and silver vessels, but also vessels of wood and of earthenware, and some to honor and some to dishonor.

esv.text: Now in a great house there are not only vessels of gold and silver but also of wood and clay, some for honorable use, some for dishonorable.

cnv.text: 在富貴人的家裡，不但有金器、銀器，也有木器、瓦器；有貴重的，也有卑賤的。

ccb.text: 大户人家不但有金器银器，也有木器瓦器，这些器皿的用途有贵贱之分。

csbs.text: 在大户人家，不仅有金器、银器，也有木器、瓦器；虽然有的为了贵重的用处，但有的却为了卑贱的用处。
